reviews.review_description: Good graphics good use of go controller  and great atmosphere   not played much but what I have played is excellent

The graphics and details are really good and the gameplay as well and the controls are easy and simple and you can also rotate too without having to use a swivel chair. i know theres going to be new features coming soon but if possible can a on/off audio option be added and just creepy sounds, i think music can be distracting in games. also i suggest adding headshots to kill the zombies. anyways look forward to more from this developer and oh yea sure will be nice if they let you smoke a virtual cigarette in that apartment and add more rooms to it.
But... I would like to use my go controller as my gun versus my head set . Other than that this game was fun !!

Found this to be a very basic horror game, both in terms of the graphics and gameplay. Quite buggy controls, as forward kept freezing. Sorry to leave a negative review but I couldn't honestly recommend this game, even at a low price.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. The new update 3.3 features improved controls and a tutorial to explain the movement. This will hopefully solve your issue.

reviews.review_description: One of those games where the forward control gives out randomly. Decent game when it does work. I did beat it... but what was the point of all the bottles and stuff that you could look at? They had no relevance to the game whatsoever

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. The new update 3.3 features improved controls and a tutorial to explain the movement. This will hopefully solve your issue.

reviews.review_description:
I love this game, but at the park with the labyrinth, I can't get any further by trial and error.
Please help me.

Ok so i went into this quite honestly because i only had 3$ for a game it wasnt my first choice or 2nd or 3rd LOL but wow i was blown away by the quality this is easily a 9.99 game excellent presentation surprising clear not blocky/fuzzy very impressed and i have both dead secret games and this is right up there with those games

I think the game is all right in my personal opinion but it's a zombie game and I guess you have to run away from the zombies and you can't run away from the zombies if the controller sticks and a zombie get you I walk a couple steps it freezes so on and so on would it be nice to have an update I think the game is all right and I'm not asking for a refund I didn't pay that much for it anyway but the freezing of the controls that needs to fix it's not fun to run away from the zombie and you get stuck in a zombie just eats away your health bar or whatever

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review. The new update 3.3 features improved controls and a tutorial to explain the movement. This will hopefully solve your issue.

reviews.review_description: I just paid for this game and its lagging really bad and won't work I want my money back or fix this issue!
I really liked the game from the start to the end, took me about 45 minutes to complete it, really spooky and the atmosphere is how it should be!!
